subcodes.first_line: O Salar! Thy Lord, the All-Chosen One, maketh mention of thee from the precincts of His Most Great Prison, wherein hath been raised the lamentation of all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سالار یذکرک ربک المختار من شطر سجنه الاعظم الذی فیه ارتفع حنین الاشیاء و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
